name: Will Solace
description:
In which you are Enyo and Ares' Handmaiden (she/her), not knowing why you laid on the rich soil of Camp Half-Blood, your ichor bleeding into the earth .

Listen, before you jump at me, it's stated in The Sun and The Star that Will is BISEXUAL!! This isn't erasure, I can promise you.. I think. Idk but I'm not trying to like... yeah. You get it.
creator: 3cchi
